message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="green" summary="Already provided feedback, count me in">
Kent Beck: Already provided design feedback and confirmed. +1 on the design. No blockers. Please count me as responded — you have Kent, Steve Krug, Lea, Heydon, Marty. That's 5. Waiting on Scott, Carson, Steve Schoger for the remaining 3.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Kent's count is slightly off -- I already have responses from all 8 reviewers. No action needed on my part, just waiting for the team lead to confirm consensus so I can proceed with the commit.
